title: Spreading Joy and Hope: Flourish Roots Foundation and Dolly Children Foundation Light Up Lives With The Bold Christmas Project - FinancialEDGE
description: On Saturday, December 14, 2024, the Dolly Children Foundation and Flourish Roots Foundation collaborated to carry out the eagerly awaited BOLD Christmas Project, a touching program that has grown to be a mainstay of holiday cheer and generosity. 100 children and their families were impacted by the foundations' successful efforts to spread holiday cheer to underprivileged
html:
On Saturday, December 14, 2024, the Dolly Children Foundation and Flourish Roots Foundation collaborated to carry out the eagerly awaited BOLD Christmas Project, a touching program that has grown to be a mainstay of holiday cheer and generosity.

100 children and their families were impacted by the foundations’ successful efforts to spread holiday cheer to underprivileged communities during the event, which celebrated its fifth year and was hosted in Makogi, Ogun State.

A compelling example of what can be accomplished when two groups with a common goal collaborate is the BOLD Christmas Project.

The ambiance at Makogi was quite enchanting, as families and kids gathered to celebrate the season in a setting full of affection and enthusiasm. The purpose of the occasion was to make lifelong memories in addition to offering gifts.

As part of this year’s campaign, each child received new school shoes and exquisitely tailored clothing—a present that extends beyond holiday cheer to meet educational needs as well.

To add to the celebratory atmosphere, party gift packs were also given out. Fun games, face painting, and interactive experiences were among the activities that were intended to help the kids connect, laugh, and form enduring relationships. Adding shine to the celebration, the gathering was further enhanced with energetic entertainment and touching carols.

Anuoluwapo Abraham, the Dolly Children Foundation’s project manager, spoke at the ceremony and thanked Flourish Roots Foundation for their unwavering support throughout the years.: “This year marks our fifth collaboration with Flourish Roots Foundation, and it’s a testament to the power of teamwork and shared vision. Together, we have continued to make a meaningful impact in the lives of children and families, ensuring that the true spirit of Christmas—love, hope, and generosity—is felt by all.”

Adeyemi Adeniyi, the Flourish Roots Foundation’s project manager, highlighted the BOLD Christmas Project’s increasing importance as it enters its fifth year: “The BOLD Christmas Project has become a beacon of hope for children in underserved communities. This partnership demonstrates the transformative power of collaboration in addressing pressing needs and spreading the spirit of giving, especially during the holiday season.”

The Flourish Roots Foundation remains unwavering in its dedication to strengthening underserved communities. For those who are most in need, their emphasis on clothing, education, and shelter guarantees a better future. By means of programs such as the BOLD Christmas Project, they diligently strive to furnish the assistance and materials required to have an enduring, constructive influence.

The Dolly Children Foundation and Flourish Roots Foundation are dedicated to giving kids and families hope and opportunity all year long, not just during the holidays.

 

L-R: Temiloluwa Okunade, Head of Content, Dolly Children Foundation; Adeyemi Adeniyi, Project Manager, Flourish Roots Foundation; Adedolapo Osuntuyi, Executive Director, Dolly Children Foundation; and Adebiyi Desalu, Representative of Flourish Roots Foundation, at the Fifth Annual BOLD Christmas Project, a collaborative initiative between Flourish Roots Foundation and Dolly Children Foundation.
